description: Iran's Ministry of Commerce (Vezarat-e Bazargani) oversaw domestic and foreign trade, market regulation, and commercial policy. In 2011 it was merged into the Ministry of Industry, Mine and Trade. Notable ministers include [Masoud Mir-Kazemi](/people/masoud-mir-kazemi) (2005–2009).
editorial_notes: Merged into Ministry of Industry, Mine and Trade in 2011 under Ahmadinejad's government restructuring.
